t.t-value: doc.software_details[0] if doc.software_details and len(doc.software_details) > 0 else False
doc.software_details[1] if doc.software_details and len(doc.software_details) > 1 else False
doc.software_details[2] if doc.software_details and len(doc.software_details) > 2 else False

doc.software_details[6] if doc.software_details and len(doc.software_details) > 6 else False
doc.configuration_details[0] if doc.configuration_details and len(doc.configuration_details) > 0 else False
doc.configuration_details[1] if doc.configuration_details and len(doc.configuration_details) > 1 else False

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background-color: #c6d9f1; text-align: center;

th.style: border: 1px solid #000; padding: 5px; color: #1f497d; border-bottom: none; font-weight: bold;

div.p: 1. Saya dengan ini berjanji sepanjang saya berkhidmat untuk:-

ul.li: Memastikan Peralatan dibawah jagaan saya dalam keadaan baik.
Tidak akan memindahkan peralatan diatas tanpa persetujuan bertulis dari BTM.
Bersedia menerima sebarang tindakan sekiranya berlaku kehilangan @ kerosakan peralatan yang disebabkan oleh kecuaian, kelalaian @ tindakan sengaja saya sendiri

div.p: 2. Kerja – Kerja pemasangan peralatan ICT telah dilaksanakan mengikut spesifikasi dan peraturan yang telah ditetapkan.
3. Dengan ini adalah disahkan bahawa pemasangan peralatan ICT telah dilaksanakan pada tarikh berikut:-

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background-color: #c6d9f1; text-align: center;

th.style: border: 1px solid #000; padding: 5px; color: #1f497d; border-bottom: none; font-weight: bold;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; text-align: center; font-size: 12px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;

td.style: border: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
border: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: none; text-align: center;
border: 1px solid #000; padding: 5px; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; font-size: 12px;
border: 1px solid #000; padding: 5px; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; overflow: hidden; object-position: center;

img.style: width: 150px; height: auto; object-fit: cover; object-position: center;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; text-align: center; font-size: 12px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background-color: #c6d9f1; text-align: center;

th.style: border: 1px solid #000; padding: 8px; color: #1f497d; border-bottom: none; border-top: none; font-weight: bold; font-size: 11.5px;

div.p: 1. I hereby promise that during my tenure as ASWARA I will:

ul.li: Ensure that the equipment under my care is in the good condition.
Not move the above equipment without written approval from BTM ASWARA.
Be prepared to accept any action in the event of loss or damage to the equipment caused by my own negligence, carelessness, or intentional actions.

div.p: 2. ICT equipment installation work has been carried out according to the specified specifications and regulations.
3. It is hereby certified that the ICT equipment installation was completed on the following date:

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background-color: #c6d9f1; text-align: center;

th.style: border: 1px solid #000; padding: 8px; color: #1f497d; border-bottom: none; font-weight: bold; font-size: 13.5px;

td.style: border: 1px solid #000; padding: 8px; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; font-size: 11px;
border: 1px solid #000; padding: 8px; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; font-size: 11px; overflow: hidden;

img.style: max-width: 150px; max-height: 75px; width: 100%; height: auto; object-fit: cover;

td.style: border: 1px solid #000; padding: 8px; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; font-size: 11px;
border: 1px solid #000; padding: 8px; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; font-size: 11px;
border: 1px solid #000; padding: 8px; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; font-size: 11px;
border: 1px solid #000; padding: 8px; border-bottom: none; text-align: center; overflow: hidden;

img.style: max-width: 200px; max-height: 100px; width: 100%; height: auto; object-fit: fill;

div.p: 1. I hereby promise that during my tenure as ASWARA I will:

ul.li: Ensure that the equipment under my care is in the good condition.
Not move the above equipment without written approval from BTM ASWARA.
Be prepared to accept any action in the event of loss or damage to the equipment caused by my own negligence, carelessness, or intentional actions.

div.p: 2. ICT equipment installation work has been carried out according to the specified specifications and regulations.
3. It is hereby certified that the ICT equipment installation was completed on the following date:

td.style: text-align: center; background-color: #c6d9f1;

div.style: border: 1px solid #ddd; width: 200px; height: 100px; text-align: center; margin: auto;
